profile: Frontend-focused software engineer with 2+ years of experience in React and TypeScript, specializing in accessible UI systems and design-system architecture. Completed a UX engineering internship building component libraries used across 3 product teams. Led a capstone team project delivering a production-ready web application. Fluent in English and Mandarin.

education.degree_line: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science | GPA - 3.82

bullet_points.text: Built a 24-component React/TypeScript library meeting WCAG 2.1 AA standards, covering forms, modals, navigation, and data display
Implemented full keyboard navigation and screen reader support across all interactive components using ARIA patterns from the W3C APG
Documented all components in Storybook with usage examples, prop tables, and accessibility annotations; deployed via Chromatic for visual regression testing
Wrote 80+ Jest and React Testing Library tests covering rendering, keyboard interaction, and ARIA attribute correctness
Tech Stack: TypeScript, React, Tailwind CSS, Storybook, Chromatic, Jest, React Testing Library
Led a team of 4 building a full-stack campus event discovery platform with Next.js, Supabase, and Tailwind CSS
Implemented real-time RSVP tracking and capacity management using Supabase Realtime subscriptions, reflecting changes across all connected clients instantly
Built an organizer dashboard with event creation, attendee management, and CSV export; scoped permissions using Supabase row-level security policies
Designed and implemented a responsive mobile-first layout tested across 6 device breakpoints using Tailwind's responsive utilities
Tech Stack: TypeScript, Next.js, Supabase, Tailwind CSS, Vercel
Built a personal finance tracker with transaction categorization, monthly budget targets, and spending trend visualizations using Recharts
Implemented CSV import from 4 major bank formats with automatic category inference based on merchant name pattern matching
Tech Stack: TypeScript, React, PostgreSQL, Recharts, Python
Built and maintained a shared React component library used across 3 product teams, reducing UI inconsistencies and cutting new feature implementation time by an estimated 25%
Audited the main product for WCAG 2.1 AA compliance, identified 34 violations, and resolved 28 within the internship period
Collaborated directly with designers in Figma to translate design tokens into CSS variables, establishing a single source of truth between design and code
Maintained and improved public-facing library web properties serving 50,000+ monthly visitors, focusing on accessibility and mobile responsiveness
Migrated 3 legacy jQuery components to modern React equivalents as part of a broader modernization effort
Handled high-volume customer service during peak hours; consistently recognized by store management for efficiency and accuracy
